_comment: PREDEFINED Phase 5 human-speech beta thresholds. Fixed BEFORE the first baseline run (see docs/editor-v2-phase5-speech-eval.md). Do NOT weaken after seeing results; a miss is a real finding. Any change requires a documented engineering justification, never gaming for green.
_minFillerRecall_note: ADDED for the round-2 rerun as a newly-discovered product-quality requirement (perfect precision with 0.22 recall does not deliver the filler-removal feature). Committed at 0.50 BEFORE the rerun; paired with the bridge suppress_tokens=[] change so Whisper emits disfluencies. Not to be tuned after seeing results.
